form_name: R2R - Affair Controlling - Titan AFM - IG Automatic Services Reinvoicing

questions.text: Titan is a tool dedicated to the simulation and the recharging of Central IG Costs (services only)
ROCC uses the same entry door as Titan, with the same frequency and G/L and material codes

options: With a recurring flow overtime ( IG contract)
Covering activities with frequent tax justification required

questions.text: Which statements about the process for creating or adding a new Service are true?
options: It is managed at global level
It is based on a governed service classification
The request originates as an email from the Requester

questions.text: The characteristics of a financial material can be viewed from the "____" Fiori app
options: Display Line Items in General Ledger

questions.text: The creation process of a new IntraGroup Customer starts with a request from the "____" in "____"
Which statements about OPD (Output Determination) are true?
options: OPD is used to determine which kind of output is needed by IG customer
It is not possible to distinguish the output between TITAN and ROCC through the PO type
List of customers, without email, to be maintained

questions.text: RRB process is used when the amount to invoice to a customer is based on the resources consumed by a project
